Chat Edit: 'Phase 3 - Threading & Specialized (Priority 3)

Threading (3,300-4,500 LOC) - Very High complexity
Chat panels (2,600-3,700 LOC)
Signal/slot system (3,100-4,100 LOC) - Very High complexity

Fully complete

Used 2 references
Read QT6_MASM_CONVERSION_ROADMAP.md, lines 1 to 100

Searched for text Phase 3 (**/*.md), 20 results
Read QT6_MASM_CONVERSION_ROADMAP.md, lines 460 to 600

Read QT6_MASM_CONVERSION_ROADMAP.md, lines 700 to 760

QT6_MASM_CONVERSION_ROADMAP.md
I've updated the QT6 MASM Conversion Roadmap to mark Phase 3 (Threading & Advanced Systems) as "Fully complete ✅". The roadmap now reflects that all components in this phase—Threading (3,300-4,500 LOC), Chat Panels (2,600-3,700 LOC), and Signal/Slot System (3,100-4,100 LOC)—have been completed.'
